theoremName: endpoint full active row rank consequence theorem

endpointCoefficientInputStatus.label: synchronized endpoint coefficient input
endpointCoefficientInputStatus.reason: The synchronized 200-point endpoint certificate closes center synchronization, analytic companion input, analytic boundary input, and the Krawczyk input, with all reported margin ratios below one.

persistentPlueckerChartStatus.label: persistent Pluecker chart remains nonzero
persistentPlueckerChartStatus.reason: The exact endpoint map remains inside the certified persistent Pluecker chart because the endpoint-radius budget is below chart capacity.

endpointFullActiveRowRankStatus.label: endpoint map has full active row rank
endpointFullActiveRowRankStatus.reason: Nonvanishing of the active Pluecker coordinate gives full row rank for the exact active endpoint map.

endpointMapOntoActiveRowsStatus.label: endpoint map is onto active rows
endpointMapOntoActiveRowsStatus.reason: A finite-dimensional linear map with full active row rank is surjective onto the active row space.

boundedEndpointRightInverseStatus.label: bounded endpoint right inverse
boundedEndpointRightInverseStatus.reason: Surjectivity in finite dimension gives a bounded right inverse.  The bound is controlled by the same certified Pluecker separation margin.

proof: Check the companion, boundary, Krawczyk, and Pluecker margin ratios are below one.
Conclude the exact endpoint map stays in the persistent Pluecker chart.
Read off full active row rank, surjectivity onto active endpoint rows, and a bounded right inverse.
